title: Suki Gifts International Gifts 14398 Galaxy Sonar Bat Soft Toy, 18 cm, Blue
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Wings can be opened and closed.
The wing inside glows in the dark.
description: Product Description Suki's galaxy bats are totally out of this world! These colourful creatures all have stripy bellies that glow in the dark and oversized eyes. Keep them Cosy by fastening their wings around their bodies with the Velcro tab or leave them open to show off their cosmic side. Box Contains 1x Suki Bat Galaxy Sonar 18 cm
